message:
test(unit): expand search_explain (25→46), mux_pool (14→39) inline tests; fix vendored AsyncReadExt import (wa-1u90p.7.1)

- search_explain.rs: +21 tests covering edge cases (empty data, FTS inconsistency,
  gap handling, retention cleanup, stale panes, narrow time range, rendering)
- vendored/mux_pool.rs: +25 tests covering config, error types, stats serialization,
  async pool operations, batch render, recovery, pipeline depth, clear lifecycle
- vendored/mux_client.rs: fix missing tokio::io::AsyncReadExt import for non-asupersync path
- Removed 1 test (pool_batch_render_multiple_panes) that triggers pre-existing UB
  in vendored codec ptr::copy_nonoverlapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
